/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc ../../lib/libopencv_objdetect460.a CMakeFiles/opencv_objdetect.dir/src/cascadedetect.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_objdetect.dir/src/cascadedetect_convert.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_objdetect.dir/src/detection_based_tracker.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_objdetect.dir/src/face_detect.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_objdetect.dir/src/face_recognize.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_objdetect.dir/src/hog.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_objdetect.dir/src/main.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_objdetect.dir/src/qrcode.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_objdetect.dir/src/qrcode_encoder.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_objdetect.dir/opencl_kernels_objdetect.cpp.obj
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ranlib ../../lib/libopencv_objdetect460.a
